column6: Activates rear delts/rhomboids to set scapula.
Hands behind head with the mid-back on the bench edge; extend over it to mobilize the upper back vertebrae.
Upper pec focus. 15-30 degree incline. The Smith bar path makes heavy solo pressing safe.
Core/Glute stability required. Do not arch back. Unrack from the J-hooks at shoulder height.
Chest and triceps compound replacing dips. Hands just inside shoulder width; tuck elbows ~45 degrees.
column7: No spotter needed — rotate the Smith bar to rack it anytime.

column6: Targets upper chest shelf. Constant tension.
Unilateral delt work. Constant tension throughout ROM. Lean away holding an upright.
Focus on locking out and spreading the rope at bottom.
Stretches the long head of the tricep. Essential for arm size.
External rotation for rotator cuff health.
Anti-extension: kneel and roll the bar out only as far as you can keep ribs down.
column7: Stop before the lower back arches.

column6: Hip & trunk flexion: control the descent; no swinging.
Metabolic finisher: quick alternating step-ups; full foot on the step.
